title: agropyron lolium
intro: Agropyron lolium, also known as couch grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agropyron lolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Agropyron lolium can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in water to reap its benefits, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine in the form of tinctures or infusions.
